notes.text: Dev script is plain `next dev` (package.json:6) and next.config.ts is empty (no watchOptions.ignored). Next 15.5 / React 19 / Tailwind v4. The Next dev watcher only excludes node_modules and .next by default; it does NOT honor .gitignore.

LIKELY CAUSE (config-confirmed, not FS-watched): endless dev recompile loop is caused by a background process writing files inside the project root that the Next watcher monitors. Candidates: .pi/memory/ (index.db, staging/*.json, bridge/ — written continuously by Pi bridge) and .cocoindex_code/ (ccc indexer, gitignored at .gitignore:43 but gitignore does not affect the watcher). Each write -> recompile. Need to confirm which writer is active via fswatch/lsof at build time.

Recommended fix (not yet applied; discuss mode is read-only): add webpack watchOptions.ignored to next.config.ts excluding **/node_modules/**, **/.git/**, **/.pi/**, **/.cocoindex_code/**. If dev later uses --turbopack, use the turbopack-equivalent ignore instead since webpack() config is not used under turbopack.

payload.context: Discuss: diagnosing endless 'Compiled in Xms (242 modules)' recompile loop in next dev console.
